// ── BHOJAN shared data ──

export const PLANS = {
  weekly: [
    {
      id: "basic-weekly",
      icon: "🌱",
      name: "Basic Tiffin",
      tagline: "Simple & filling",
      desc: "Perfect for students and solo folks. Wholesome desi meals Mon–Fri & 2days desirable.",
      price: 399,
      period: "week",
      savings: null,
      featured: false,
      meals: "Lunch only",
      days: "Mon – Fri (5 days)",
      deliveries: "1× per day",
      features: [
        { text: "5 meals/week (Mon–Fri)", yes: true },
        { text: "Standard rotating menu", yes: true },
        { text: "1 delivery per day", yes: true },
        { text: "Lunch only", yes: true },
        { text: "Custom meal preferences", yes: false },
        { text: "Priority support", yes: false },
      ],
    },
    {
      id: "double-weekly",
      icon: "🏠",
      name: "Double Decker",
      tagline: "Lunch + Dinner",
      desc: "Both meals covered. Best for office workers who skip the kitchen entirely.",
      price: 649,
      period: "week",
      savings: "Most popular pick",
      featured: true,
      meals: "Lunch + Dinner",
      days: "Mon – saturday (5 days)",
      deliveries: "2× per day",
      features: [
        { text: "10 meals/week (Mon–Fri)", yes: true },
        { text: "Seasonal menu variety", yes: true },
        { text: "2 deliveries per day", yes: true },
        { text: "Lunch + Dinner", yes: true },
        { text: "Custom preferences (add-on)", yes: true },
        { text: "Priority support", yes: false },
      ],
    },
    {
      id: "family-weekly",
      icon: "👨‍👩‍👧",
      name: "Family Pack",
      tagline: "Feeds 2–3 people",
      desc: "For couples or small families who want ghar ka khana without the effort.",
      price: 999,
      period: "week",
      savings: null,
      featured: false,
      meals: "Lunch + Dinner for 3",
      days: "Mon – Sun (7 days)",
      deliveries: "2× per day",
      features: [
        { text: "7 days/week", yes: true },
        { text: "Lunch + Dinner for 3", yes: true },
        { text: "Weekend special meals", yes: true },
        { text: "Seasonal menu variety", yes: true },
        { text: "Custom preferences (add-on)", yes: true },
        { text: "Dedicated support", yes: true },
      ],
    },
  ],
  monthly: [
    {
      id: "basic-monthly",
      icon: "🌱",
      name: "Basic Tiffin",
      tagline: "Simple & filling",
      desc: "Perfect for students and solo folks. Wholesome desi meals Mon–Fri.",
      price: 1399,
      period: "month",
      savings: "Save ₹197 vs weekly",
      featured: false,
      meals: "Lunch only",
      days: "Mon – Fri (~22 days)",
      deliveries: "1× per day",
      features: [
        { text: "~22 meals/month", yes: true },
        { text: "Standard rotating menu", yes: true },
        { text: "1 delivery per day", yes: true },
        { text: "Lunch only", yes: true },
        { text: "Custom meal preferences", yes: false },
        { text: "Priority support", yes: false },
      ],
    },
    {
      id: "double-monthly",
      icon: "🏠",
      name: "Double Decker",
      tagline: "Lunch + Dinner",
      desc: "Both meals covered. Best for office workers who skip the kitchen entirely.",
      price: 2299,
      period: "month",
      savings: "Save ₹297 — best value!",
      featured: true,
      meals: "Lunch + Dinner",
      days: "Mon – Fri (~22 days)",
      deliveries: "2× per day",
      features: [
        { text: "~44 meals/month", yes: true },
        { text: "Seasonal menu variety", yes: true },
        { text: "2 deliveries per day", yes: true },
        { text: "Lunch + Dinner", yes: true },
        { text: "Custom preferences (add-on)", yes: true },
        { text: "Priority support", yes: false },
      ],
    },
    {
      id: "family-monthly",
      icon: "👨‍👩‍👧",
      name: "Family Pack",
      tagline: "Feeds 2–3 people",
      desc: "For couples or small families who want ghar ka khana without the effort.",

      period: "month",
      savings: "Save ₹497 vs weekly",

        { text: "Custom preferences (add-on)", yes: true },

export const MENU_ITEMS = [
  { emoji: "🍚", label: "Dal + Rice" },
  { emoji: "🫓", label: "2 Rotis" },
  { emoji: "🥘", label: "Sabzi" },
  { emoji: "🥗", label: "Salad" },
  { emoji: "🍮", label: "Weekend Sweet" },
  { emoji: "🧃", label: "Chaas / Buttermilk" },
  { emoji: "🥣", label: "Seasonal Special" },
];

export const TESTIMONIALS = [
  {
    name: "Arjun Sharma",
    role: "Software Engineer, Lucknow",
    text: "As a bachelor living alone, BHOJAN has been a lifesaver. The Double Decker plan means I never have to think about food after work.",
    plan: "Double Decker",
    avatar: "AS",
  },
  {
    name: "Priya Mehta",
    role: "Student, Amity University",
    text: "Hostel food was terrible. Basic Tiffin gives me real ghar ka khana at a price that fits my student budget.",
    plan: "Basic Tiffin",
    avatar: "PM",
  },
  {
    name: "Rakesh & Sunita",
    role: "Working couple, Kanpur",
    text: "With two jobs and a kid, we had no time to cook. Family Pack has given us our evenings back. The weekend sweets are a bonus!",
    plan: "Family Pack",
    avatar: "RS",
  },
];

export const STATS = [
  { value: "2,400+", label: "Happy subscribers" },
  { value: "98%",    label: "On-time delivery" },
  { value: "150+",   label: "Home cooks" },
  { value: "4.8★",   label: "Avg. rating" },
];
